About Me

Data-Driven
by Nature

Information Systems undergraduate with a passion for SQL, data analytics, and building tools that help businesses make smarter decisions.

As a Database Systems Teaching Assistant, I've guided 110+ students in SQL and database concepts. I've built real POS analytics systems for UMKM businesses, and I'm proficient in MySQL, PostgreSQL, Python, Power BI, and Tableau. Strong in critical thinking, multitasking, and teamwork — seeking internship opportunities in data-related roles.

Professional Journey

Duration
Sept 2025
— Dec 2025
Completed
Assistant Lecturer — Database System
Atma Jaya University Yogyakarta · Faculty of Information Technology
  • Assisted more than 110 students in comprehending database concepts and SQL through structured guidance and hands-on learning approaches.
  • Designed and developed assignments and practical exercises focused on data analysis using SQL.
  • Guided students in performing data extraction, filtering, and aggregation techniques using SQL.
  • Provided instruction on advanced SQL queries including JOIN, Subqueries, and GROUP BY to transform raw data into meaningful insights.
